keyEvents.text: Goal! Curaçao 1, Saint Lucia 0. Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Livano Comenencia.
Goal! Curaçao 2, Saint Lucia 0. Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kenji Gorré.
Goal! Curaçao 3, Saint Lucia 0. Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Joshua Brenet with a headed pass following a corner.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Trent Alexander replaces Leaus Henville.

Substitution, Saint Lucia. Hemaiael Charlery replaces Ryan Charles.
